title: Admin registration via 6-digit code + Gallery section with admin management

requirements.summary: Replace first-caller-wins admin claim UI with a 6-digit code input form that calls claimAdminWithCode backend function
acceptanceCriteria: The admin claim UI shows a 6-digit code input field instead of a bare button.
Submitting the correct code (131104) successfully registers the user as admin and updates the UI to show admin status.
Submitting a wrong code displays a clear error message.
If admin is already registered, the claim form is hidden and the panel shows the authenticated admin's status.

file_operations.description: Replace the AdminStatusBanner's single 'Claim Admin Access' button with a form containing a 6-digit code input field and a submit button. When submitted, call the backend's claimAdminWithCode method with the entered code. Display success toast on approval and error toast with the backend's error message if the code is wrong or admin already exists. Hide the claim form and show admin status when an admin is already registered.

requirements.summary: Add a public Gallery section to the portfolio page displaying artwork images from the backend with responsive grid layout and lightbox view
acceptanceCriteria: A Gallery section is visible on the public portfolio page with its own navigation anchor.
Gallery images are fetched from the backend and displayed in a responsive grid or masonry layout.
Clicking an image opens a fullscreen lightbox view.
The section shows a loading skeleton while images are being fetched.
The section gracefully shows an empty state if no gallery images have been uploaded.

file_operations.description: Create a new GallerySection component that fetches gallery images using a React Query hook calling listGalleryImages(). Render images in a responsive masonry or grid layout using Tailwind classes. Each image should use the ExternalBlob's getDirectURL() method to display the image. Implement click handlers that open a lightbox dialog (using shadcn/ui Dialog component) showing the clicked image in fullscreen. Show skeleton loaders while images are loading. Display an empty state message with an icon if no images are returned.

Add a new React Query hook useGetGalleryImages that calls actor.listGalleryImages() with queryKey ['galleryImages']. Return the query result including isLoading and error states for use in GallerySection.
Import and render the new GallerySection component between the FeaturedProjects section and the ContactSection. Wrap it in a section element with id='gallery' to enable navigation anchor linking.

Add a new navigation link labeled 'Gallery' that scrolls to the #gallery anchor. Insert it in the navigation menu between the existing 'Projects' and 'Contact' links. Ensure the scroll-spy logic includes 'gallery' in the sections array so the link highlights when the Gallery section is in view.

requirements.summary: Add a Gallery management tab in AdminPanel for uploading new artwork images (up to 15MB) and deleting existing ones
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Gallery' tab is present in the AdminPanel alongside existing tabs.
The Gallery tab shows a file upload control accepting image files.
Attempting to upload a file larger than 15MB shows a clear client-side error before sending to the backend.
Uploaded images appear in a preview grid immediately after successful upload.
Each gallery image in the preview grid has a delete button that removes it after confirmation.
The tab is only accessible/functional when the user is logged in as admin.

file_operations.description: Add a new 'Gallery' tab to the AdminPanel tabs array. In the Gallery tab content, render a file upload input that accepts image types (image/*). Add client-side validation that checks file size before upload and shows an error toast if the file exceeds 15MB (15,728,640 bytes). When a valid file is selected, convert it to an ExternalBlob using ExternalBlob.fromBytes() and call the backend's addGalleryImage method with the blob, filename, and mimeType. Show upload progress using withUploadProgress(). Below the upload control, fetch and display all gallery images in a responsive grid using the useGetGalleryImages hook. Each image card should show a thumbnail (using getDirectURL()) and a delete button. On delete click, show a confirmation dialog, then call deleteGalleryImage with the image ID and invalidate the gallery images query to refresh the list.

Add mutation hooks useAddGalleryImage and useDeleteGalleryImage. useAddGalleryImage should call actor.addGalleryImage() and invalidate the ['galleryImages'] query on success. useDeleteGalleryImage should call actor.deleteGalleryImage() with the image ID and invalidate the ['galleryImages'] query on success. Both mutations should handle errors appropriately and return them to the calling component.
